top_signals.title: Ukraine Steel Giant Tests Investor Demand After Bond Redemption
top_signals.summary: Metinvest BV is sounding out fixed-income investors on a potential return to the market after the Ukrainian steel and mining group had to fund the redemption of a bond using cash earlier this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fortress-Backed Poundstretcher Wins Court Approval for Rent Cuts
top_signals.summary: Poundstretcher Ltd.’s restructuring plan won court approval, giving the struggling UK discount retailer a lifeline to continue trading as it battles deteriorating finances and a costly portfolio of stores.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Don’t Give Up on Global Order
top_signals.summary: America depends on global order—and can restore it.
